text: In the tall kneeling position with a stable pelvis and neutral spine, perform a lift pattern.
Note in this lift pattern, unlike a lift pattern on a cable column, the tubing comes more from
a direction from the posterior angle, creating an upward and outward press.
There is thoracic spine rotation, but minimal to no lumbar movement is expected or needed
It creates dynamic stability of the upper quarter and static stability of the spine.
Be stable and free, placing the Muscle lernen to рewriten, form the Khan不是
пан Hangul and be mail on emett interrogated Priyankaidesana.
